Tests the `Math.ceil` function to verify it rounds 1.9 up to 2.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function in JavaScript. It uses an `assert` statement to check that the result of `Math.ceil(1.9)` is equal to `2`. The `Math.ceil` function is expected to return the smallest integer greater than or equal to a given number. This script provides narrow functionality by focusing on a single test case to ensure the correct operation of the `Math.ceil` method.
